title: Reward Commands for BedWars1058 | [1.8 Support]
body:
**Despite the description, the original is not compatible with 1.8. I only made the plugin compatible with 1.8 only. For the newer Minecraft versions please use andrei1058's plugin.​**




BEDWARS 1058



THIS IS AN ADD-ON FOR BEDWARS1058 MINIGAME

This plugin allows to run commands when a game is ended so they will be executed for players in the winner team. It can also execute commands when there is a finnal kill for the victim both the killer.
Commands can be executed by console or player itself.

Configuration location: plugins/BedWars1058/Addons/Cmds/config.yml

BedWars1058 Rewards Addon 1.8 Support
